205: The support of thy companions is unwavering. Venture boldly into the vast unknown.

206: Break bread with peoples diverse and many. A dawn of golden blessings awaits.

1205: A new love blossoms. Follow thy heart's desires.

1206: Cooperation shall pave the way to the very stars themselves.

2205: Share without reservation. Thy virtues will be rewarded.

2206: Seek out comrades-in-arms, and thy feats of valor shall reach ever greater heights.

3205: The path of independence is paved with delight. It is up to thee to embrace it.

3206: Hone thy perception and gain insight into the hearts of others.

4205: Be not led astray by the clamor and tumult of the world. Remain steadfast in thy beliefs.

4206: Seek encounters in lands distant and unknown.

5205: Resign thyself not to disharmony. Dialogue fosters understanding.

5206: Vanity is the enemy of reputation. Stay true to thyself.
